info.description: REST API for AltMount — Usenet WebDAV server with NZB queue, health monitoring, ARR integration, FUSE/rclone mounting, and Stremio addon.
info.title: AltMount API

post.description: Automatically registers AltMount as a download client (SABnzbd-compatible) in all configured ARR instances.
Tests whether AltMount is reachable as a download client from all configured ARR instances.

get.description: Returns health check results from all configured Sonarr/Radarr instances.
Returns all configured Sonarr/Radarr instances.

post.description: Tests connectivity to a Sonarr/Radarr instance with given credentials.

get.description: Returns a specific Sonarr/Radarr instance by type and name.
Returns sync statistics for all configured ARR instances.

post.description: Receives file-import webhook events from Sonarr/Radarr and triggers health checks. Authenticated via API key query parameter.
Automatically registers AltMount as a webhook connection in all configured Sonarr/Radarr instances.

get.description: Returns authentication configuration (login required flag, available providers). Public endpoint.

post.description: Authenticates with username and password and returns a JWT access token. Rate-limited to 10/min per IP.
Creates the first admin user account. Only allowed when no users exist yet.

get.description: Returns whether registration is currently open (i.e. no users exist yet).
Returns the current AltMount configuration with sensitive values masked.

put.description: Replaces the entire AltMount configuration. Triggers restart if required.

post.description: Runs a speed test against the specified NNTP provider and saves the result to config.
Reloads the AltMount configuration from disk without restarting.
Validates a configuration object without saving it.

patch.description: Updates a specific named section of the configuration (e.g. import, sabnzbd, rclone).

get.description: Returns all currently active NZB file streams. Optionally filter by type=file.

delete.description: Terminates an active NZB file stream by ID.

post.description: Exports multiple mounted files as NZBs packed in a single ZIP archive.

get.description: Exports the metadata of a mounted file back to a downloadable NZB file.
Returns metadata for a mounted NZB file including segment info, encryption, and status.
Returns a history of recently completed NZB file streams.

post.description: Force-unmounts the FUSE filesystem using platform-specific commands (fusermount/umount).
Mounts the NZB filesystem at the given path using FUSE.

get.description: Returns the current status of the FUSE mount (stopped, starting, running, error).

post.description: Gracefully unmounts the FUSE filesystem.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of file health records with optional status/search filters.

post.description: Deletes multiple health records by ID.
Triggers repair attempts for multiple corrupted files.
Resets multiple health records to pending status for re-checking.
Adds a file to the health monitoring queue for checking.

delete.description: Removes old health records based on age, status, or both. Optionally deletes physical files.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of health records with corrupted status.

post.description: Cancels an in-progress library sync operation.
Simulates a library sync and returns what would be changed without applying it.

get.description: Returns whether a library sync is needed based on current configuration state.
get.summary: Check if library sync is needed

post.description: Triggers a library sync operation to reconcile the file system with the database.

get.description: Returns the current status of the library sync worker.

post.description: Regenerates all library symlinks and STRM files for files that already have metadata.
Resets all health records to pending status for a full re-check cycle.

get.description: Returns counts of health records grouped by status.
Returns the current status and statistics of the background health check worker.
Returns a single health record by ID.

delete.description: Deletes a health record and optionally the associated physical file.

post.description: Cancels an in-progress health check for a file.
Triggers an immediate health check for a file, bypassing the queue.
Sets the checking priority for a health record.
Triggers a repair attempt for a corrupted file.
Clears the streaming-failure mask on a health record so it can be checked again.
Adds an NZB file at a given filesystem path to the import queue. Public endpoint (API key in query).

get.description: Returns a paginated list of completed import records.

delete.description: Removes all completed import history records.

post.description: Starts an import from a WebDAV/NZBDav source, fetching NZBs from the remote.

parameters.description: Import configuration (uses server config if omitted)
parameters.name: body

delete.description: Cancels the currently running NZBDav import operation.

post.description: Resets the NZBDav import state so a new import can be started.

get.description: Returns the current status of the NZBDav import operation.

post.description: Scans a directory for NZB files and adds them to the import queue.

delete.description: Cancels the currently running manual directory scan.

get.description: Returns the current status of the manual directory scan operation.

post.description: Accepts an NZB file upload, queues it with high priority, and synchronously waits for completion before returning Stremio-compatible stream URLs for all media files found in the NZB output. Authenticated via download_key form field (SHA256 of API key).
post.summary: Get Stremio streams for NZB file

parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the user's API key
parameters.name: download_key

post.description: Adds a new NNTP provider to the configuration.

put.description: Sets the priority order of NNTP providers.

post.description: Tests NNTP provider connectivity with given credentials, returning RTT on success.

put.description: Updates an existing NNTP provider by ID.

delete.description: Removes an NNTP provider by ID from the configuration.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of NZB download queue items with optional filters.

delete.description: Deletes multiple queue items by ID. Cannot delete items currently being processed.

post.description: Requests cancellation of multiple currently-processing queue items.
Resets multiple queue items to pending status for reprocessing.

delete.description: Removes all completed items from the queue.
Removes all failed items from the queue.
Removes all pending items from the queue.

get.description: Returns current queue statistics (counts by status, average processing time).
Returns historical import statistics over a rolling window (last 24h, 7d, 30d, 365d).

parameters.description: Number of days of history (default 1, max 365)
parameters.name: days

post.description: Downloads a test NZB from sabnzbd.org and adds it to the queue for connectivity testing.
Uploads an NZB file and adds it to the download queue.
Searches for an NZB by name via the configured indexer and adds the result to the queue.
post.summary: Search NZB by name and add to queue

post.description: Resolves one or more nzblnk:// links and adds the resulting NZBs to the queue.

get.description: Returns a single queue item by ID.

delete.description: Deletes a queue item by ID. Cannot delete items currently being processed.

post.description: Requests cancellation of a queue item that is currently being processed.

get.description: Downloads the original NZB file associated with a queue item.

patch.description: Changes the priority of a pending or failed queue item.

post.description: Resets a failed, pending, or completed queue item to pending and triggers processing.

get.description: Returns the Stremio addon manifest JSON for installation. The key authenticates the addon.
Downloads the NZB from Prowlarr by URL, queues it with high priority, waits for download completion, then redirects (302) to the first media stream URL.

parameters.description: Safe filename title for the NZB
parameters.name: title

get.description: Searches Prowlarr for matching NZBs and returns Stremio-compatible stream URL options.
Lists filesystem entries at a given path for directory/file picker UIs.

parameters.description: Directory path to browse (defaults to root)
parameters.name: path

post.description: Removes old queue items and health records based on age. Supports dry-run mode.

get.description: Returns health status of all system components (database, workers, etc.).
Returns download/upload metrics, speed, and per-provider connection statistics.

post.description: Schedules a graceful system restart. Use force=true to skip safety checks.

get.description: Returns combined queue, health, and system information statistics.

post.description: Resets accumulated system statistics counters (pool metrics, download counters).
Pulls the latest Docker image and restarts the container to apply the update.

get.description: Checks Docker Hub for the latest available version and returns whether an update is available.
Returns information about the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Generates a new API key for the authenticated user, invalidating the old one.
Invalidates the current session and JWT token.

put.description: Changes the password for the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Issues a new JWT access token using the current valid token.

movie.description: For upgrades/renames, the file path might be in other fields or need to be inferred

download_key.description: SHA256 of the API key, used for download/stream URLs

database_records_to_clean.description: Number of database records to clean

would_cleanup.description: Whether cleanup would occur based on config

delete_files.description: Whether to also delete the physical files

percentage.description: Progress percentage (0-100), only for items being processed

fallback_api_key_set.description: Indicates if API key is set

dsn.description:
DSN is the PostgreSQL connection string (postgres only).
Example: "postgres://user:password@localhost:5432/altmount?sslmode=disable"

path.description: Path is the SQLite database file path (sqlite only).

type.description: Type selects the database backend: "sqlite" (default) or "postgres".

max_age.description: Max age in days to keep files

max_backups.description: Max number of old files to keep

max_size.description: Max size in MB before rotation

api_key.description: APIKey is the Prowlarr API key.

categories.description:
Categories filters search results by Newznab category IDs.
Defaults to 5000 (Movies), 5010 (Movies/Foreign), 5030 (TV), 5040 (TV/HD).

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether Prowlarr search is active for the Stremio addon.

host.description: Host is the Prowlarr base URL (e.g. "http://localhost:9696").

languages.description:
Languages is an optional list of keywords; releases must contain at least one to pass.
Empty = no filtering. Examples: ["Esp", "🇪🇸", "Spanish", "DUAL"]

qualities.description:
Qualities is an optional list of keywords; releases must contain at least one to pass.
Empty = no filtering. Examples: ["1080p", "HD", "4K", "3D"]

fallback_host.description: Fallback configuration for sending failed imports to external SABnzbd

base_url.description:
BaseURL is the public base URL used when building Stremio stream links
(e.g. "https://altmount.example.com"). Falls back to the auto-detected
request origin when not set.

enabled.description:
Enabled controls whether the endpoint is active. Disabled by default.
When false, the endpoint returns 404 Not Found.

nzb_ttl_hours.description:
NzbTTLHours controls how long a completed NZB result is cached before
the same NZB is re-processed on the next request.
Set to 0 to disable expiry (cache forever). Defaults to 24 hours.

prowlarr.description: Prowlarr configures the Prowlarr indexer used by the Stremio addon to search for NZBs.

x-enum-comments.HealthStatusCorrupted: File has missing segments or is corrupted
x-enum-comments.HealthStatusPending: File has not been checked yet
x-enum-comments.HealthStatusRepairTriggered: File repair has been triggered in Arrs

x-enum-descriptions: File has not been checked yet
File repair has been triggered in Arrs
File has missing segments or is corrupted

x-enum-comments.QueueStatusFallback: Sent to external SABnzbd as fallback

x-enum-descriptions: Sent to external SABnzbd as fallback

tags.description: File metadata, streams, and NZB export
tags.name: Files

tags.description: Manual file imports and directory scanning
tags.name: Import

tags.description: Stremio addon and NZB stream endpoints
tags.name: Stremio
